hero.experienceTagline: Experience the Majesty of the Nordics: Landscapes That Stir the Spirit, Adventures That Feed the Soul.
hero.educationTagline: Igniting Minds, Unveiling the Wonders of Knowledge. Explore Beyond Boundaries, Learn Without Limits.

packages.title: Popular destinations and routes
packages.description: Here you find a selection of travel packages around Nordics.

items.title: Fjord Explorer Journey
items.description: Embark on a voyage through the serene waters of the Nordic fjords, witnessing breathtaking landscapes and pristine nature.

tasks.name: Boarding the vessel
tasks.description: Meet at the harbor to board our state-of-the-art exploration vessel.

tasks.name: Fjord navigation briefing
tasks.description: Receive a comprehensive briefing on fjord geography and navigation techniques.

tasks.name: Wildlife spotting
tasks.description: Spot and learn about local wildlife, including seals, eagles, and dolphins.

tasks.name: Lunch at a remote cove
tasks.description: Enjoy a gourmet lunch prepared by our onboard chef in a secluded cove.

tasks.name: Kayaking adventure
tasks.description: Explore the fjords up close in a kayak, guided by our expert instructors.

tasks.name: Evening reflections
tasks.description: Reflect on the day's adventures over dinner as we anchor in a peaceful bay.

items.title: Midnight Sun Hiking
items.description: Discover the magic of the midnight sun with guided hikes through the untouched Nordic wilderness, offering unparalleled views and solitude.

tasks.name: Pre-hike orientation
tasks.description: Gather for an orientation session on the unique phenomena of the midnight sun.

tasks.name: Hike commencement
tasks.description: Begin the hike under the ethereal light of the midnight sun, with stops at scenic outlooks.

tasks.name: Mid-hike campfire
tasks.description: Enjoy stories and local delicacies by the campfire, surrounded by the tranquil night.

tasks.name: Summit at midnight
tasks.description: Reach the summit to experience the full majesty of the sun at midnight, a moment of awe and serenity.

tasks.name: Descent and return
tasks.description: Descend under the still-bright sky, returning with memories of an unforgettable journey.

items.title: Viking Heritage Tour
items.description: Step back in time on a cultural odyssey exploring the rich Viking heritage of the Nordics, from ancient ruins to historic villages.

tasks.name: Museum visit
tasks.description: Start the day with a guided tour of the National Viking Museum, showcasing rare artifacts.

tasks.name: Traditional Viking lunch
tasks.description: Enjoy a meal of traditional Viking fare in a reconstructed longhouse.

tasks.name: Archaeological site exploration
tasks.description: Explore an archaeological site with remnants from the Viking Age, guided by an expert historian.

tasks.name: Viking shipbuilding workshop
tasks.description: Participate in a workshop on ancient shipbuilding techniques, crafting a miniature Viking ship.

tasks.name: Evening saga storytelling
tasks.description: Conclude the day with an evening of Viking sagas and legends, narrated by a local skald.

items.title: Arctic Survival Challenge
items.description: Test your limits with an immersive survival experience in the Arctic wilderness, guided by seasoned survival experts.

tasks.name: Survival skills briefing
tasks.description: Begin with a briefing on essential survival skills and gear preparation.

tasks.name: Shelter building
tasks.description: Learn to build a shelter using natural materials found in the Arctic environment.

tasks.name: Ice fishing
tasks.description: Try your hand at ice fishing, learning techniques to catch fish in frozen lakes.

tasks.name: Wilderness navigation
tasks.description: Navigate through the wilderness using traditional and modern tools under expert guidance.

tasks.name: Campfire cooking
tasks.description: Prepare a meal with your catch of the day, cooking over an open campfire.

tasks.name: Arctic survival tactics
tasks.description: Evening discussion on advanced survival tactics and strategies for the Arctic environment.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.description: Explore our services and connections to our partners.

items.title: Viking Line Cruise
items.description: Embark on a majestic journey through the Baltic Sea, exploring scenic coastlines and historic ports with the comfort and elegance of our Viking Line Cruises.

items.title: VR Train Expeditions
items.description: Experience the beauty of the Nordic landscapes through the window of our VR trains, offering fast, eco-friendly, and comfortable travel across the region.

items.title: Husky Sled Adventures
items.description: Dive into the thrill of the Arctic wilderness with our Husky Sled Adventures, where you can steer your own sled team across frozen landscapes under the Northern Lights.

items.title: Sailing Cruise Trip
items.description: Set sail on a breathtaking cruise, navigating the clear Nordic waters and discovering secluded islands, with opportunities for fishing, swimming, and wildlife spotting.

items.title: Aurora Borealis Tours
items.description: Join us for an unforgettable night under the stars, where we chase the mesmerizing Northern Lights, offering guided tours in prime viewing locations.

items.title: Ski and Snowboard Escapes
items.description: Hit the slopes with our premium ski and snowboard packages, catering to all skill levels and offering access to top resorts with breathtaking mountain views.

items.title: Wildlife Photography Safaris
items.description: Capture the majestic beauty of Nordic wildlife on our photography safaris, guided by professional photographers through untouched natural habitats.

items.title: Kayak Expeditions
items.description: Paddle through serene fjords and along rugged coastlines on our guided kayak expeditions, suitable for adventurers of all experience levels.

items.title: Guided Hiking Tours
items.description: Explore the great outdoors with our guided hiking tours, featuring breathtaking trails through national parks, mountains, and coastal paths.

items.title: Nordic Culinary Experiences
items.description: Savor the flavors of the North with our culinary tours, offering tastings of traditional dishes, visits to local markets, and cooking classes with expert chefs.

items.title: Cultural Festival Tours
items.description: Immerse yourself in Nordic culture with our festival tours, attending authentic celebrations, music festivals, and historical reenactments.

items.title: Castle and Heritage Sites
items.description: Step back in time as you visit ancient castles, Viking settlements, and UNESCO World Heritage sites, rich in history and architectural marvels.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: We offer different pricing structure to meet the need for groups of different sizes.

tiers.title: Special Purpose
description: Ideal for filming, competitions, and other special events
Tailored services to meet event needs
Logistical support for equipment and personnel

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: See what our customers love about our products. Discover how we excel in efficiency, durability, and satisfaction. Join us for quality, innovation, and reliable support.

experience.name: Elsa Nygard
experience.testimonial: Exploring the Arctic wilderness with Finuo's Northern Lights trip was a surreal experience. Their expertise in choosing the perfect spots allowed me to capture some of my best shots under the celestial dance of the auroras.

experience.name: Mikkel Jensen
experience.testimonial: Finuo's commitment to authentic Nordic experiences shines through their meticulously planned hiking tours. The vistas of untouched landscapes were breathtaking, and their knowledgeable guides made the journey unforgettable.

experience.name: Sofia Karlsson
experience.testimonial: The Santa Claus Village tour with Finuo was magical. It was more than just a trip; it was stepping into a fairy tale. The joy on my children's faces was priceless, and the attention to detail made it a special family memory.

experience.name: Liam O'Sullivan
experience.testimonial: As a ski instructor, I've experienced many ski trips, but Finuo's ski trip was top-notch. The perfect balance of thrill and safety, with luxury accommodations, made it stand out. Highly recommended for both beginners and pros.

experience.name: Anna Petrova
experience.testimonial: The snowmobile adventure organized by Finuo was exhilarating! Racing across the snow-covered landscapes was a thrilling experience, and their team ensured everything was seamless from start to finish. The gear provided was first-rate, making the adventure not only thrilling but also safe.

experience.name: Oliver Thomson
experience.testimonial: Documenting the Nordic cities with Finuo was an extraordinary journey. Their city tours are well-curated, combining historical depth with modern vibrancy. The insights provided by our guides were invaluable for our project.

education.name: Emma Thompson
education.testimonial: Finuo's guidance was pivotal in my journey to securing a place at my dream university. Their personalized approach and expert advice on application strategies truly made all the difference.

education.name: Liam Johnson
education.testimonial: With Finuo's help, I navigated the complex world of college applications with ease. Their workshops and one-on-one sessions provided me with the tools I needed to succeed.

education.name: Olivia Brown
education.testimonial: I was overwhelmed by the medical school application process, but Finuo's consultants were there every step of the way. Their support and insights were invaluable.

education.name: Noah Wilson
education.testimonial: The career counseling services at Finuo have been a game-changer for my professional development. Their tailored advice helped me land a competitive internship in my field.

education.name: Ava Martinez
education.testimonial: Choosing Finuo for my PhD application process was the best decision I made. Their expertise in crafting compelling research proposals set me apart from other candidates.

education.name: William Garcia
education.testimonial: Thanks to Finuo, I received several university offers with scholarships. Their personalized mentorship and strategic planning were key to highlighting my strengths.

educationServices.title: Education Services
educationServices.description: Finuo Education Consulting is your trusted partner in making your dreams of studying abroad a reality. Our comprehensive range of services is designed to support students at every step of their journey:

items.title: Promoting Local Finnish Educational Resources
items.description: We connect students with a wide range of educational opportunities in Finland, including renowned universities, vocational schools, and high schools. We provide detailed information about these institutions, their programs, and their unique offerings.

items.title: School and Program Selection Assistance
items.description: We understand that choosing the right school and program is crucial for students' academic and career aspirations. Our experienced consultants work closely with students to assess their academic interests, career goals, and personal preferences. Based on this information, we provide personalized guidance to help students make informed decisions.

items.title: Application Guidance and Support
items.description: Navigating the application process can be overwhelming. We offer comprehensive guidance and support to ensure students meet all application requirements. Our consultants assist students in preparing their application materials, such as resumes, essays, and recommendation letters, to maximize their chances of success.

items.title: Visa and Immigration Assistance
items.description: We provide valuable support in the visa and immigration process. Our team assists students with document preparation, appointment scheduling, and guidance on fulfilling the necessary requirements. We strive to simplify the visa process and ensure a smooth transition for students.

items.title: Accommodation and Adaptation Support
items.description: Moving to a new country can be challenging. We offer guidance on finding suitable accommodation options that align with students' preferences and budgets. Additionally, we provide cultural orientation and language training to help students adapt to their new environment and make the most of their study abroad experience.

items.title: Scholarship and Financial Aid Support
items.description: We recognize the importance of financial considerations in pursuing an education abroad. Our consultants provide guidance on available scholarships and financial aid opportunities, helping students explore options to fund their studies and alleviate financial burdens.
